cards.subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2 – 3
cards.about_sw: Utambuzi wa rangi mbalimbali, kujenga mahusiano, kushirikiana na kukuza lugha, uhusiano wa macho na kuonesha hisia.
cards.about_en: Recognition of various colours, building relationships, cooperation and language development, eye coordination, and expressing feelings.
cards.materials_sw: Kadi na picha mbalimbali za rangi, mikebe yenye rangi tofauti tofauti (Zingatia rangi za msingi: Nyekundu, manjano, bluu).
cards.materials_en: Various colour cards and pictures, containers of different colours (Focus on primary colours: Red, yellow, blue).
cards.steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji ukiweka vifaa vyote mezani au kwenye sakafu kulingana na mazingira.
2. Kaa mkao ambao watoto wote wataweza kukuona.
3. Waoneshe watoto kadi za rangi mbalimbali ulizoandaa.
4. Waongoze watoto kubainisha kwa kuoanisha rangi walizoziona.
5. Waongoze watoto kukaa katika vikundi kwa kuzingatia rangi walizozibainisha.
6. Wapongeze watoto kwa kuweza kubainisha rangi mbalimbali.
7. Wape fursa watoto kuchagua rangi wanazopendelea.
8. Chunguza Watoto wanavyobaini rangi mbalimbali wanaposhiriki shughuli hiyo na kutoa msaada kwa mwenye uhitaji.

Tanbihi:
1. Endapo kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, tumia mbinu nyingine shirikishi mfano, kumgusisha kitu mkononi, na kumwezesha kutumia milango mitano ya fahamu, kukuza kadi kwa mtoto mwenye uoni hafifu, kwa mtoto kiziwi kutoa maelekezo kwa kumwonyesha vitendo.
2. Shughuli hii itakamilika ndani ya vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti.

Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi amwongoze mtoto kutaja aina mbalimbali za rangi na kuoanisha na vitu vyenye rangi mbalimbali katika mazingira ya nyumbani.
cards.steps_en:
1. Prepare a friendly learning environment by placing all materials on a table or on the floor according to the setting.
2. Sit in a position where all children can see you.
3. Show the children the various colour cards you have prepared.
4. Guide the children to identify by matching the colours they have seen.
5. Guide the children to sit in groups according to the colours they have identified.
6. Praise the children for being able to identify various colours.
7. Give children the opportunity to choose their favourite colours.
8. Observe how children distinguish various colours while participating in the activity and provide support to those who need it.

Note:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, use other inclusive methods such as letting them touch objects, enabling them to use the five senses, enlarging cards for a child with low vision, and for a deaf child give instructions by demonstrating actions.
2. This activity will be completed within three sessions on different days.

Parent participation at home: Guide the parent to help the child name various colours and match them to coloured objects in the home environment.

cards.subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu – Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
cards.about_sw: Utambuzi wa rangi mbalimbali, kujenga mahusiano, kushirikiana na kukuza lugha, uhusiano wa macho na kuonesha hisia.
cards.about_en: Recognition of various colours, building relationships, cooperation and language development, eye coordination and expression of feelings.
cards.materials_sw: Kadi na picha mbalimbali za rangi, mikebe yenye rangi tofauti tofauti (Zingatia rangi za msingi: Nyekundu, manjano, bluu).
cards.materials_en: Various colour cards and pictures, containers of different colours (Focus on primary colours: Red, yellow, blue).
cards.steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji ukiweka vifaa vyote mezani au kwenye sakafu kulingana na mazingira.
2. Kaa mkao ambao watoto wote wataweza kukuona.
3. Waoneshe watoto kadi za rangi mbalimbali ulizoandaa.
4. Waongoze watoto kubainisha kwa kuoanisha rangi walizoziona.
5. Waongoze watoto kukaa katika vikundi kwa kuzingatia rangi walizozibainisha.
6. Wapongeze watoto kwa kuweza kubainisha rangi mbalimbali.
7. Wape fursa watoto kuchagua rangi wanazopendelea.
8. Chunguza watoto wanavyobaini rangi mbalimbali wanaposhiriki shughuli hiyo na kutoa msaada kwa mwenye uhitaji.

Tanbihi:
1. Endapo kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, tumia mbinu nyingine shirikishi mfano, kumgusisha kitu mkononi, na kumwezesha kutumia milango mitano ya fahamu, kukuza kadi kwa mtoto mwenye uoni hafifu, kwa mtoto kiziwi kutoa maelekezo kwa kumwonyesha vitendo.
2. Shughuli hii itakamilika ndani ya vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti.
cards.steps_en:
1. Prepare a friendly learning environment by placing all materials on a table or on the floor according to the setting.
2. Sit in a position where all children can see you.
3. Show the children the various colour cards you prepared.
4. Guide the children to identify by matching the colours they have seen.
5. Guide the children to sit in groups according to the colours they have identified.
6. Praise the children for being able to identify various colours.
7. Give the children an opportunity to choose their favourite colours.
8. Observe how children identify various colours as they participate in the activity and provide support to those who need it.

Note:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, use other inclusive strategies such as letting them touch an object, enabling them to use all five senses, enlarging cards for a child with low vision, and for a deaf child give instructions by showing actions.
2. This activity will be completed within three sessions on different days.

cards.subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
cards.title_en: Activity 8: Making a picture by collage/sticking
cards.about_sw: Kukuza misuli midogo ya vidole, umakini, ubunifu, kukuza kipaji, kukuza uwezo wa kujieleza
cards.about_en: Developing fine finger muscles, attention, creativity, talent development, and the ability to express oneself
cards.materials_sw: Chati ya karatasi nyeupe, vipande vidogo vya karatasi (magazeti ya zamani, karatasi zilizotumika, kalenda), mchanga na vipande vya nguo, gundi
cards.materials_en: White paper chart, small pieces of paper (old magazines, used paper, calendars), sand and fabric scraps, glue
cards.steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na eneo lililo safi na mazingira rafiki
2. Kaa na watoto katika umbo la duara.
3. Waambie watoto watatengeneza picha kwa kubandika vipande vya karatasi kwenye mchoro.
4. Onesha kwa vitendo jinsi ya kuchana vipande vidogo vidogo vya karatasi na kuvigundisha kwa gundi kwenye karatasi ngumu iliyochorwa umbo fulani
5. Onesha jinsi ya kupaka gundi katika karatasi ngumu
6. Waelekeze watoto namna ya kubandika vikaatasi katika karatasi ngumu
7. Waelekeze kuiweka mahali ili iweze kukauka
8. Watake watoto kuchukua kazi zao na kuelezea kilichotokea
9. Kisha waulize maswali ya ufahamu juu ya kazi walizozifanya
10. Waelekeze watoto kusafisha mazingira waliyofanyia kazi na watake watoto kusafisha mikono
11. Chunguza Watoto wanapofanya kazi hiyo na kutoa msaada kwa mwenye uhitaji huo.

Tanbihi:
1. Endapo kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, tumia mbinu nyingine shirikishi mfano, kumgusisha na kumwongozo, kwa mtoto kiziwi kutoa maelekezo kwa vitendo (lugha ya alama)
2. Shughuli hii itakamilika ndani ya vipindi vitatu kwa kurudia kwa wakati tofauti na kwa kubadilisha matumizi ya vifaa
cards.steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and a clean, child-friendly environment.
2. Sit with the children in a circle.
3. Tell the children they will make a picture by sticking pieces of paper onto a drawing.
4. Demonstrate how to tear small pieces of paper and paste them with glue onto a hard paper that has a shape drawn on it.
5. Show how to apply glue onto the hard paper.
6. Guide children on how to stick the paper pieces onto the hard paper.
7. Direct them to place it somewhere to dry.
8. Ask children to pick up their work and explain what happened.
9. Then ask comprehension questions about the work they did.
10. Direct children to clean the work area and ask children to wash their hands.
11. Monitor children as they do the activity and provide assistance to those who need it.

Note:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, use other inclusive methods such as guiding by touch; for a deaf child, give instructions through actions (sign language).
2. This activity will be completed over three sessions by repeating at different times and changing the materials used.

cards.subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
cards.title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kutembea kwa msawazo, kuruka, kukimbia, kupanda na kushuka, kuchapa kwa kutumia mguu, kujiviringisha
cards.title_en: Activity 1: Walking in balance, jumping, running, climbing and descending, stamping with feet, rolling
cards.about_sw: Kudhibiti mijongeo, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, utambuzi wa sauti, ubunifu na umakini.
cards.about_en: Controlling movements, strengthening large and small muscles, sound recognition, creativity and attention.
cards.materials_sw: Kamba nyembamba ya katani au manila, ubao, kadi/picha zinazoonesha mchezo wa msawazo, chaki, rangi, kijiti cha kuchorea, filimbi.
cards.materials_en: Thin sisal or manila rope, a board, cards/pictures showing balance games, chalk, paint, a drawing stick, a whistle.
cards.steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa vitakavyotumika kuchezea mchezo wa kutembea kwa msawazo pamoja na mazingira ambayo watoto watacheza mchezo huo. Hakikisha mazingira yawe salama na rafiki kwa watoto.
2. Waongoze watoto katika eneo la wazi la kucheza mchezo wa kutembea kwa msawazo.
3. Waoneshe picha/chati mbalimbali zinazoonesha mchezo wa kutembea kwa msawazo
4. Chora mstari ulionyooka/ubao/ au kamba nyembamba ya katani.
5. Onesha jinsi ya kutembea kwenye mstari kwa msawazo
6. Waeleze watoto kanuni rahisi za kucheza mchezo huo mf. Kutembea ukiwa umenyooka kufuata mstari
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kutembea kwa msawazo na wasaidie wanapohitaji msaada.

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi sita. Pia zingatia kwamba matendo ya msawazo yatahusisha kuruka na kukimbia kwa msawazo, kuchapa miguu, kujiviringisha
cards.steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials to be used for the balance walking game along with the environment where the children will play. Make sure the environment is safe and child-friendly.
2. Guide the children to an open area to play the balance walking game.
3. Show them various pictures/charts depicting the balance walking game.
4. Draw a straight line / use a board / or a thin sisal rope.
5. Demonstrate how to walk along the line in balance.
6. Explain simple rules for playing the game, e.g., walk upright following the line.
7. Observe whether each child is able to walk in balance and assist those who need help.

Note:
This activity can be facilitated over six sessions. Also note that balance activities will include jumping and running in balance, stamping feet, and rolling.

cards.subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
cards.about_sw: Kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, umakini, umoja, ushirikiano, kukuza lugha na ubunifu
cards.about_en: Strengthening large and small muscles, attention, unity, cooperation, developing language and creativity
cards.materials_sw: Mpira, chaki, rangi, mawe madogo, madogo, ndoo, bakuli
cards.materials_en: Ball, chalk, paint, small stones, small items, bucket, basin
cards.steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na mazingira ambayo watoto watacheza mchezo huo. Hakikisha mazingira yawe salama na rafiki kwa watoto.
2. Waongoze watoto katika eneo la wazi la kucheza mchezo wa kulenga shabaha, liliochorwa duara ubaoni au kuwekwa chombo kilichoandaliwa kwa ajili ya kulenga.
3. Waoneshe picha/chati mbalimbali zinazoonesha mchezo wa kulenga shabaha
4. Waoneshe watoto jinsi watakavyo cheza mchezo huo,
5. Muite mtoto mmoja mmoja na kucheza mchezo huo
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anashiriki mchezo huo na kuwasaidia inapohitajika

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalumu ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa mara nne/vipindi vinne.
cards.steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials and the environment where the children will play the game. Make sure the environment is safe and child-friendly.
2. Guide the children to an open area to play the target aiming game, with a circle drawn on the board or a container set up for aiming.
3. Show them various pictures/charts depicting the target aiming game.
4. Show the children how they will play the game.
5. Call one child at a time to play the game.
6. Observe whether each child is participating in the game and assist when needed.

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity can be facilitated four times/four sessions.

cards.subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
cards.title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kuigiza mijongeo ya Wanyama mbalimbali
cards.title_en: Activity 3: Imitating the movements of various animals
cards.about_sw: Kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, umakini, umoja ushirikiano, kukuza lugha na ubunifu
cards.about_en: Strengthening large and small muscles, attention, unity and cooperation, language development and creativity
cards.materials_sw: Picha mbalimbali za wanyama, runinga, simu
cards.materials_en: Various pictures of animals, television, mobile phone
cards.steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na mazingira ambayo watoto watacheza mchezo huo. Hakikisha mazingira yawe salama na rafiki kwa watoto.
2. Waweke watoto kwenye umbo la u
3. Waoneshe picha/chati mbalimbali za wanyama
4. Waongoze watoto wataje wanyama wanao wajua
5. Waonyeshe watoto mijongeo ya wanyama kwa kutumia video katika runinga au simu
6. Mlezi awaonyeshe watoto mijongeo ambayo wanyama mbalimbali wanavyotembea
7. Wape nafasi watoto watembee kwa kuigiza mijongeo ya wanyama waliowaona
8. Chunguza kama watoto wameweza kutembea kwa mijongeo

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano ukibadilisha aina za wanyama
cards.steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and an environment where children will play the game. Ensure the environment is safe and child-friendly.
2. Place the children in a U-shape
3. Show them various pictures/charts of animals
4. Guide the children to name the animals they know
5. Show the children the movements of animals using videos on television or a phone
6. The caregiver shows the children the movements that various animals use to walk
7. Give the children the opportunity to walk by imitating the movements of animals they observed
8. Check whether the children were able to walk using the movements

Note:
This activity can be done in five sessions while changing the types of animals

cards.subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
cards.about_sw: Kudhibiti mijongeo, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, utambuzi wa sauti, ubunifu na umakini
cards.about_en: Controlling movements, strengthening large and small muscles, sound recognition, creativity and attention
cards.materials_sw: Ngoma, vijiti, filimbi, mavazi ya jadi, nzuga, gitaa, simu, manyanga, redio
cards.materials_en: Drums, sticks, flute, traditional attire, shakers, guitar, mobile phone, maracas/rattles, radio
cards.steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na mazingira ambayo watoto watachezi muziki huo. Hakikisha mazingira yawe salama na rafiki kwa watoto.
2. Kaa na watoto katika umbo la nusu duara au mkao wowote unaofaa.
3. Waongoze watoto kutaja mavazi ya jadi, vifaa vya muziki na kuvipiga/kuvitumia.
4. Waongoze watoto kucheza kwa kufuata mdundo wa muziki.
5. Hakikisha kila mtoto anashiriki kikamilifu katika kucheza.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kucheza kufuata mdundo

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii ifanyike kwa vpindi 4 ukiwa unabadilisha aina ya muziki na mijongeo.
cards.steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and an environment where children will play music. Ensure the environment is safe and child-friendly.
2. Sit with the children in a semicircle or any appropriate seating arrangement.
3. Guide the children to name traditional attire, musical instruments and how to play/use them.
4. Guide the children to play following the rhythm of the music.
5. Ensure each child participates fully in playing.
6. Check whether each child was able to play following the rhythm.

Note:
This activity should be done in 4 sessions while changing the type of music and movements.

cards.subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi za Ubunifu wa Sauti
cards.title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kutengeneza sauti kwa kutumia sehemu za mwili
cards.title_en: Activity 1: Making sounds using body parts
cards.about_sw: Kujenga stadi/maarifa kukuza uwezo wa wa kubaini milio mbalimbali, kuimarisha misuli na kukuza misamiati
cards.about_en: Building skills/knowledge to develop the ability to identify various sounds, strengthen muscles and expand vocabulary
cards.materials_sw: Mwili wa mtoto na mlezi, (mfano kupiga makofi, vidole, miguu chini na kupuliza vitu vinavyotoa sauti) mkeka
cards.materials_en: The body of the child and caregiver (for example clapping hands, fingers, stomping feet on the ground and blowing objects that produce sound), mat
cards.steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na mazingira wezeshi kila mtoto asimame
2. Waweke watoto katika umbo la "U"
3. Waongoze watoto kuimba nyimbo rahisi kama kichwa, Bega, magoti na vidole wakati mtoto wakipiga sauti kwa sehemu unazotaja
4. Fanya sauti moja moja na useme jina lake kwa sauti ya kufurahisha
5. Onesha mfano: Piga makofi – Pa!Pa! Piga kifua – Dom!Dom! Piga mapaja – "Pwa!Pwa" Kanyaga sakafu-" Tap!Tap", Piga midomo -"Popo!Popo" Piga ulimi –"Toktoktok"
6. Chunguza kama mtoto ameweza kutengeneza sauti za mwili

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 10 kutengeneza sauti kwa kupiga makofi kupiga kifua, Mapaja, kukanyaga sakafu kwa miguu, kupiga midomo, kupiga ulimi
2. Watoto wenye ulemavu wa kusikia tumia ishara za mikono, watoto wasioona wasaidie kwa kuwashikisha viungo vyao vya mwili na uwaongoze wapige viungo vyao vya mwili ili kutoa sauti
3. Watoto wenye ulemavu wa akili tumia maelezo mafupi ya moja kwa moja mfano "Piga"
cards.steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and an enabling environment so each child can stand
2. Place the children in a "U" shape
3. Guide the children to sing simple songs like head, shoulders, knees and toes while children make sounds with the body parts named
4. Make one sound at a time and say its name in an entertaining voice
5. Show an example: Clap hands – Pa!Pa! Hit chest – Dom!Dom! Slap thighs – "Pwa!Pwa" Stamp floor – "Tap!Tap", Pop lips – "Popo!Popo" Click tongue – "Toktoktok"
6. Check whether the child was able to make sounds with their body

Note:
1. This activity will be done in 10 sessions to produce sounds by clapping hands, hitting the chest, thighs, stamping the floor with feet, popping lips, clicking the tongue
2. For children with hearing impairment use hand signs; for children who are visually impaired assist them by holding their body parts and guide them to strike their body parts to produce sound
3. For children with intellectual disabilities use short direct instructions, for example "Hit"

cards.subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 2–3 | Kutambua Utamaduni wa Jamii Yake
cards.title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kutaja aina za vyakula vya jamii inayomzunguka
cards.title_en: Activity 3: Naming types of foods from the surrounding community
cards.about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Stadi za kukuza lugha na misamiati, Stadi za Kujenga Usikivu, umakini.
cards.about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: Language and vocabulary development skills, Listening and attentiveness skills.
cards.materials_sw: Vibao, Vitabu, Chati, Tabuleti au Runinga zenye picha mnato/mjongeo za vyakula mbalimbali
cards.materials_en: Flashcards, Books, Charts, Tablets or TVs with pictures/videos of various foods
cards.steps_sw:
1. Andaa Vifaa vya kujifunzia pamoja na eneo
2. Waambie watoto wasimame/wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri
3. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku kwa kuwaonesha watoto vyakula halisi au picha zake
4. Imba wimbo wenye kutaja majina ya Vyakula na kisha waongoze watoto waimbe pamoja nawe
5. Gawa picha zenye aina mbalimbali za Vyakula na igiza kuwaomba moja moja huku ukitaja jina la chakula (mfano: Naomba ugali…) huku ukichukua picha ya ugali kutoka kwa mtoto
6. Waongoze watoto kupeana au kuonyesha picha huku wakitaja jina la chakula
7. Wawekee watoto michezo mbalimbali ya picha mfano: vibao fumbo… vyenye picha na majina ya vyakula
8. Chunguza ushiriki wa watoto na kuwahimiza wale wasioshiriki hata kama hawawezi kutaja majina ya vyakula kwa usahihi.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itafanyika mara 4 kwa kuwapa mazoezi Zaidi ya kutaja majina ya vyakula mbalimbali
cards.steps_en:
1. Prepare learning materials and the environment
2. Ask children to stand/sit in a circle or "U" shape or semi-circle. Stand in a position where all children can see you well
3. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity by showing them real foods or pictures of them
4. Sing a song that mentions names of foods and then guide the children to sing along with you
5. Distribute pictures of various types of foods and pretend to ask for them one by one while naming the food (e.g., I want ugali…) while taking the picture of ugali from the child
6. Guide children to pass or show pictures while naming the food
7. Give children various picture games, e.g., puzzle cards with pictures and names of foods
8. Monitor children's participation and encourage those who are not participating even if they cannot name the foods correctly.
NOTE: This activity will be done 4 times to give more practice in naming various foods

cards.subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 2–3 | Kutambua Utamaduni wa Jamii Yake
cards.title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kutaja vitendo vya heshima na adabu (Kuomba, Kutoa, Kupokea na Kushukuru)
cards.title_en: Activity 4: Naming acts of respect and good manners (Asking, Giving, Receiving and Thanking)
cards.about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Stadi za kukuza lugha na misamiati, kujenga stadi za mahusiano, Heshima, Adabu, Nidhamu, Utii, Upendo, Urafiki.
cards.about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: Language and vocabulary development skills, building relationship skills, Respect, Good Manners, Discipline, Obedience, Love, Friendliness.
cards.materials_sw: Vibao, Vitabu, Picha zinazoonesha watoto wakisalimiana, Radio, Runinga, Tabuleti, Ngoma, vitu mbalimbali mfn Mpira/midoli
cards.materials_en: Flashcards, Books, Pictures showing children greeting each other, Radio, TV, Tablet, Drum, various items e.g. Ball/dolls
cards.steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la Ujifunzaji na vifaa kisha waweke watoto wasimame/wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
2. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku kwa kuimba wimbo wa kushukuru baada ya kupewa kitu
3. Igiza kuomba na kupokea na kutoa kitu kwa watoto tofauti tofauti.
4. Waongoze watoto kuigiza kuomba, kutoa na kupokea kitu kwa mwenzie kwa kusema 'naomba', 'chukua' 'asante'.
5. Chunguza jinsi watoto wanavyo omba, kutoa, kupokea na kushukuru, msaidie mtoto ambaye hajaweza kushiriki.
6. Waongoze watoto kusikiliza nyimbo zilizorekodiwa zenye maudhui ya kushukuru.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itafanyika mara 3 kwa kuwapa nafasi watoto kuigiza kutumia maneno ya kuomba, kutoa, kupokea na kushukuru.
cards.steps_en:
1. Prepare the learning environment and materials then have children stand/sit in a circle or "U" shape or semi-circle. Stand in a position where all children can see you well.
2. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity by singing a song of thanks after receiving something
3. Role-play asking, receiving and giving items to different children.
4. Guide children to role-play asking, giving and receiving items from a friend by saying 'naomba' (please/I ask), 'chukua' (take) and 'asante' (thank you).
5. Observe how children ask, give, receive and give thanks; help the child who has not been able to participate.
6. Guide children to listen to recorded songs with themes of gratitude.
NOTE: This activity will be done 3 times to give children the opportunity to role-play using words of asking, giving, receiving and thanking.

cards.subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 2–3 | Kutambua Utamaduni wa Jamii Yake
cards.title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kutaja vitendo vya heshima na adabu – Kuomba Msamaha
cards.title_en: Activity 5: Naming acts of respect and good manners – Asking for Forgiveness
cards.about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Stadi za kukuza lugha na misamiati, kujenga stadi za mahusiano, Heshima, Adabu, Nidhamu, Utii, Upendo, Urafiki.
cards.about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: Language and vocabulary development skills, building relationship skills, Respect, Good Manners, Discipline, Obedience, Love, Friendliness.
cards.materials_sw: Vibao, Vitabu vya hadithi fupi, Radio, Runinga, Tabuleti, Ngoma, vitu mbalimbali mfano Mpira/midoli.
cards.materials_en: Flashcards, Short story books, Radio, TV, Tablet, Drum, various items e.g. Ball/dolls.
cards.steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo na vifaa mbalimbali vinavyofaa kutumia katika shughuli hii
2. Waambie watoto wasimame/wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri
3. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku kwa kusimulia hadithi fupi yenye maudhui ya kuomba msamaha
4. Waongoze watoto kuigiza vitendo vya kuomba msamaha vinavyojitokeza kwenye hadithi mfano baada ya kumkanyaga mwenzie, kumpiga na mpira
5. Waongoze watoto kuimba wimbo wenye maudhui ya kuomba msamaha
6. Onesha picha mjongeo inayoonyesha igizo la kuomba msamaha
7. Waongoze watoto kuigiza mchezo wa kuomba msamaha. Hakikisha wote wanashiriki kikamilifu
8. Chunguza jinsi watoto wanavyoshiriki na kutumia maneno ya kuomba msamaha wanapokosea
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itafanyika mara 3 katika vipindi tofauti kwa kuwapa mazoezi kupitia kuigiza matukio mbalimbali yanayosababisha kuomba msamaha.
cards.steps_en:
1. Prepare the environment and various materials suitable for use in this activity
2. Ask children to stand/sit in a circle or "U" shape or semi-circle. Stand in a position where all children can see you well
3. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity by telling a short story with a theme of asking for forgiveness
4. Guide children to role-play acts of asking for forgiveness that appear in the story, for example after stepping on a friend, or hitting them with a ball
5. Guide children to sing a song with a theme of asking for forgiveness
6. Show a video/animation showing a role-play of asking for forgiveness
7. Guide children to role-play a game of asking for forgiveness. Ensure all participate fully
8. Observe how children participate and use words of asking for forgiveness when they make mistakes
NOTE: This activity will be done 3 times in different sessions to give practice through role-playing various situations that lead to asking for forgiveness.
